results.title: 'Many emotions' - Eckert on FA investigation, Spygate reaction and more Stewart talks
results.description: Southampton head coach Tonda Eckert admitted he does not know when the FA will finally conclude its investigation, in his first interview since Spygate.

results.title: Memorial Cup-winning coach Jussi Ahokas hired by Avalanche’s AHL team
results.description: A promising bench boss with a winning pedigree is turning pro for the first time...on this side of the pond. On Friday, the Colorado Avalanche announced that the team has hired Jussi Ahokas as the team’s as the new head coach of their American Hockey League affiliate, the Colorado Eagles.
